about_me.headline: Who I am
about_me.title: About me
about_me.intro: Hi, I am Tobias. I come from a background in product and 3D design, where I learned how to turn complex ideas into tangible results. Now I do the same through code: building modern, responsive interfaces and thoughtful Python-based backends. When design and logic come together, that’s where I feel at home.
about_me.question1: Remote, hybrid, or onsite - what matters most to me is effective collaboration. Location is secondary.
about_me.question2: I learn quickly, experiment often, and integrate new tools or frameworks into small projects to understand how they work in practice.
about_me.question3: I enjoy collaborative work because different perspectives often lead to more elegant solutions.

skills.intro: I work across both front-end and back-end development, building responsive interfaces with HTML, CSS and JavaScript, and developing structured, reliable logic with Python. My background in product and 3D design gives me a strong sense for usability, clean structure and detail. I stay curious, learn quickly, and keep up with the fast pace of modern web development.
skills.contactMe: Feel free to reach out. I’m always open to new projects and opportunities to grow, collaborate and build on my existing experience.

contact.encourageText: Just drop me a message if you need support. I’m always excited to collaborate and create something meaningful together.
contact.needFrontend: Frontend? Backend? Full Stack? No problem!
contact.privacyText3: and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.
contact.privacyError: *You must agree to the privacy policy
contact.messageError: *Please enter a message with at least 10 characters

testimonials.headline: What my colleagues say about me

first.text: Tobias is a reliable and committed member of the project team. He communicates clearly and contributes to efficient coordination. His structured approach and consistent use of project management principles ensure stable workflows. His clean, readable code and technical accuracy play a key role in the project’s success.
first.author: Demis Moysidis – Join

second.text: Tobias demonstrates strong competence and works in a structured and precise way. He solves complex problems through analytical thinking and remains calm when facing challenges. His experience and teamwork make him a key contributor and a respected colleague.
second.author: Amer Alkhalidy – Join

third.text: Tobias works with great commitment and takes on a large share of the project tasks. His reliability and responsibility ensure the project’s success. Without his consistent effort, the result would not have reached the same level. I fully recommend him.
third.author: Madina Askar Zada – Kochwelt

fourth.text: Tobias shows ambition and finds solutions for every challenge. He supports team members reliably and shares his knowledge openly. His help strengthens the team’s collaboration.
fourth.author: Julian Kohn – Join

projects.headline: Portfolio
projects.description: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

join.name: Join
join.description: A Kanban-style task manager built with Angular, TypeScript and Firebase. I worked on the frontend, implemented services and forms, and managed the GitHub workflow. I also took over the Scrum-based project management, bringing structure and coordination to the team.

knighthood.name: Knighthood
knighthood.description: An object-oriented jump-and-run game featuring expanded gameplay and a fully redesigned look. I created custom sprites and sounds, added mechanics like two projectile types, a punch-and-sword combat system, multiple enemy types, a parallax background, and a scoreboard. The game logic is implemented in JavaScript, with layout handled in HTML and CSS.

coderr.name: Coderr
coderr.description: A developer service marketplace built on a robust Django REST architecture. I implemented a complex backend system that separates customer and provider profiles, manages offers, and features detailed filtering and review logic. The API utilizes token-based authentication and ensures seamless communication between the frontend and a PostgreSQL database to replicate professional business workflows.

pokedex.name: Pokedex
pokedex.description: A digital Pokédex app that dynamically loads Pokémon data such as types, abilities and evolutions using the PokéAPI. I implemented data fetching and processing in JavaScript and designed the interface with HTML and CSS. This project demonstrates my ability to structure API data and translate it into a responsive, user-friendly frontend.

spectrogram.name: Spectrogram
spectrogram.description: A browser-based real-time spectrogram for analysing harsh vocals – built with Vanilla JavaScript and the Web Audio API. The tool visualises overtones and subharmonics directly in the browser with no external dependencies. It demonstrates my ability to process complex audio data streams efficiently and translate them into meaningful visual representations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains which personal data is processed when you visit this portfolio website or use the contact form.
privacy.general_text: Personal data is processed only to the extent necessary to provide a functional website, respond to inquiries, and maintain the technical security of the site.
privacy.hosting_text: When you access this website, technically necessary connection data is processed so the page can be delivered in your browser. This may include IP address, date and time of access, requested resource, referrer, browser type, and operating system. The website is hosted by ALL-INKL.COM - Neue Medien Münnich. The processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR due to the legitimate interest in secure and stable website operation.
privacy.contact_form_intro: If you use the contact form, the following data is processed and sent to the server-side mail endpoint on this domain:
privacy.contact_form_data_consent: Confirmation that you accepted this privacy policy
privacy.contact_form_purpose: The data is processed exclusively to handle your inquiry and any follow-up communication.
privacy.contact_form_legal_basis: The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR if you give consent and, where your request is aimed at entering into a contract or pre-contractual communication, Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. In other cases, processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR due to the legitimate interest in responding to inquiries.
privacy.contact_form_storage: Your message is stored only as long as necessary to process the request. If statutory retention obligations apply, storage may continue for the legally required period.
privacy.server_logs_text: For technical and security reasons, the hosting environment may temporarily store server log data. This usually includes the IP address, access time, requested file, status code, browser information, and operating system. This processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacy.recipients_text: Personal data is only disclosed where this is necessary for website operation or communication processing. This primarily concerns the hosting provider ALL-INKL.COM - Neue Medien Münnich and the technical email infrastructure receiving contact requests.
privacy.external_links_text: This website contains links to external pages such as GitHub, LinkedIn, and project pages. These services are only accessed when you click a link yourself. From that moment on, the respective provider is responsible for processing personal data on its website.
privacy.cookies_text: Based on the current implementation, this website does not use its own cookies that are set for analytics, marketing, or user profiling purposes.
privacy.analytics_text: No analytics, tracking, or marketing tools are currently integrated in the application code.
privacy.rights_intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.right_withdrawal: Right to withdraw consent with future effect
privacy.right_objection: Right to object to processing based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR
privacy.complaint_text: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates applicable law.
privacy.updates_text: This privacy policy may be updated if the website or legal requirements change.
privacy.contact_final: If you have any questions about data protection, please contact mail@tobiasdreifke.com.
